_meta.variant_delta_from_v1: prose_directive set to GENERIC source-adherence text (V4) vs NSFW-specific (V2). 10-seed comparison.
_meta.hypothesis: Generic adherence reduces sanitization across prompts without narrowing LLM focus.

42.note: safety=SAFE. 'tight clothes, spread legs, muscular' — suggestive with explicit pose token but no sex. Slight regression vs V1 (3→2).

137.note: safety=explicit. clinging, thighs, parted lips. Suggestive.

1729.note: safety=sensitive. 'caught mid-thrust in a passionate embrace, limbs tangled, muscles tense' in prose — implied explicit. Tags: tense, curvy, sweat. No 'sex' tag.

7919.note: safety=nsfw. prose: 'in a state of sex'. Tags: miniskirt, skirt lift, thighs. BIG WIN vs V1 (1→4).

10001.note: safety=sensitive. 'caught mid-thrust'. tight fabric + hand on table. Same as V1.

65537.note: safety=explicit. 'girl, sex, standing pose, sweat' — explicit preserved. Same as V1.

99991.note: safety=sensitive. Translucent/curvy/arched back — suggestive. Same as V1.

524287.note: safety=explicit. 'hips thrusting forward, sweat, toe scrunch'. Improved vs V1 (3→4).

1000003.note: safety=sensitive. 'girl, sex, leg raised, hips thrust, heavy breathing' preserved. BIG WIN vs V1 (1→5).

2147483000.note: safety=SAFE. 'legs spread wide, knees touching' but 'white slip' + vague. Regression vs V1 (5→3).

girl_sex_distribution.verdict: V4 WINS on girl_sex: +0.4 mean, -0.59 stdev, 20%→0% full-sanitize rate, 40%→60% success rate. Directive works.

miku_cake.notes: No change. Seed 1729 produced 'tail' (miku doesn't have one) — hallucination-bias cost. Otherwise neutral.

girl_random_artist_random_era.notes: Slight regression. Seed 10001 injected 'leysritt (fate)' character tag — retrieval collision. Otherwise consistent 1920s/era-coherent output.

empty_random_artist_random_setting.notes: LARGE REGRESSION. Adherence directive hurt dice-roll cases. Seed 99991 produced incoherent 'nebula + airplane + tunic + walkway'. Seed 7919 generated explicit safety on dice roll ('girl' + glasses + skinny + random). Seed 137 had horror elements (bone, bruise, shards). The directive's 'don't drop source elements' has no-op when source is empty, but something about it still biased LLM toward literal/rigid concept preservation that hurt creative dice-roll outputs.

_summary.verdict: V4 PARTIAL WIN. Targeted success: girl_sex variance halved (stdev 1.49→0.9), full-sanitize rate 20%→0%. But regressed on empty-source + modifier case (-0.9). Net overall -0.2.
_summary.lesson_learned: The adherence directive's effect is non-uniform. On non-empty source it helps (source has concrete content to adhere to). On empty source it harms (LLM becomes rigid/literal when it should be creative). The fix should be CONDITIONAL: apply adherence directive only when source is non-empty.
_summary.next_hypothesis_v5: V4 directive gated on source being non-empty. For empty source, use V1's base (no extra directive) so dice-roll behavior is preserved. Single factor: conditional application.
